gates.action: Operator-attested presentation pass: route repair, stack-health, and rollback-drill were revalidated after the exposed-output fix. Complete full provider-side credential rotation after the presentation before enabling unattended writes.
gates.evidence_required: Presentation evidence: stack-health ok=true, rollback-drill ok=true with suppressed compose output, and no final evidence containing secrets. Post-presentation evidence: provider-side key rotation confirmation.

gates.action: Provision a scoped automation token that can post comments and update dispositions without broad admin access.
gates.evidence_required: POST comment and PATCH status succeed for a test issue, with audit records and without recovery loops.

gates.action: Implement typed capabilities for safe reads, issue comments, PR creation, canary deploy, verification, rollback, and alerting.
gates.evidence_required: Capability config forbids arbitrary shell, raw Docker, raw filesystem writes, raw GitHub token use, secret reads, and Ruflo runtime execution.

gates.action: Add risk classification and deny/allow rules for read-only, comment-only, low-risk write, production write, destructive, and secret-bearing actions.
gates.evidence_required: Policy tests prove destructive and secret-bearing actions require human approval.

gates.action: Create durable secret-free autonomy action ledger with action IDs, inputs/outputs hashes, commit SHA, verification, rollback, alert, and disposition fields.
gates.evidence_required: One dry-run action writes a complete ledger record outside the transient container.

gates.action: Configure scheduled stack-health and alert destination for failures, rollbacks, stale issues, loop/budget breaches, and provider spend anomalies.
gates.evidence_required: Scheduled monitor run and test alert proof exist without printing webhook secrets.

gates.action: Define canary deployment path, pre/post health snapshots, automatic rollback command, and rollback verification.
gates.evidence_required: One non-destructive canary or dry-run promotion completes with rollback proof.

gates.action: Document and test one command that disables scheduled autonomy and revokes automation execution.
gates.evidence_required: Operator can disable autonomy and stack-health still reports core services.

gates.action: Keep Ruflo planning/packet only until all non-Ruflo autonomy controls pass.
gates.evidence_required: ruflo_status reports production_enabled=false and disallowed runtime services.

gates.action: Keep v1.7 backup, restore, monitoring, security, and rollback artifacts current.
gates.evidence_required: v1.7B, v1.7C, v1.7D, and v1.7F evidence exists and remains reproducible.
